payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Dark brown/gray flat wooden cabinet door with vertical wood grain and a recessed rectangular panel, matte finish, a faint narrow gap or seam along the left edge and no visible handle; image shows uneven lighting with a central glare and slight blur — approximately 1.0 m from the camera.

message.content: {"label":"cabinet","short_description":"tall dark wood cabinet door","long_description":"Dark brown/gray flat wooden cabinet door with vertical wood grain and a recessed rectangular panel, matte finish, a faint narrow gap or seam along the left edge and no visible handle; image shows uneven lighting with a central glare and slight blur — approximately 1.0 m from the camera.","attributes":["dark brown/gray color","wood/veneered material","vertical grain texture","recessed rectangular panel","narrow left-edge gap/seam","matte/dull finish","no visible handle","uneven lighting with central glare","slight blur"],"distance_from_camera_m":1.0}
